title: neolitsea zeylanica
intro: Neolitsea zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon box tree or Ceylonneolitsea, is a species of evergreen tree native to Sri Lanka and other parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neolitsea zeylanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herb for treating various health conditions. Neolitsea zeylanica can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
